description: 夕阳珊瑚 - 暖橙 + 奶白,热烈克制的活力色,适合热点 / 榜单 / 潮流 / 轻快话题

styles.body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 15.5px; color: #2b1a10; line-height: 1.8; letter-spacing: 0.35px; word-spacing: 1.5px; padding: 20px 16px; background: #fffaf5;
styles.h1: font-size: 23px; font-weight: 800; color: #2b1a10; text-align: left; margin: 34px 0 22px; padding: 0 0 14px 0; border-bottom: 3px solid #ff6b4a; letter-spacing: 0.3px; line-height: 1.4;
styles.h2: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; color: #2b1a10; margin: 38px 0 18px; padding: 10px 14px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ffe8dd 0%, #ffe8dd 3px, #fff3eb 3px, transparent 100%); border-radius: 4px; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.2px;
styles.h3: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #c43a1a; margin: 28px 0 12px; padding: 0 0 0 12px; border-left: 3px solid #ff6b4a; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.p: margin: 16px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #2b1a10; line-height: 1.85;
styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 18px 22px; background: #fff0e6; border-left: 4px solid #ff6b4a; color: #5a3722; font-size: 14.5px; border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0; line-height: 1.85; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 10px; margin: 24px auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(255,107,74,0.12); border: 1px solid #ffe0d0;
styles.strong: color: #c43a1a; font-weight: 800; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 60%, #ffdbaa 60%, #ffdbaa 95%, transparent 95%); padding: 1px 4px;
styles.code_inline: background: #fff0e6; color: #c43a1a; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', 'SF Mono', monospace; border: 1px solid #ffd4be;
styles.code_block: background: #2b1a10; color: #ffe8dd; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 24px 0; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; -moz-tab-size: 2; tab-size: 2; font-variant-ligatures: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles.ol: margin: 18px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #ff6b4a; font-weight: 900; font-size: 13px; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #ff6b4a; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; min-width: 22px; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #ff6b4a, transparent); margin: 38px 0; opacity: 0.5;
styles.a: color: #c43a1a; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(196,58,26,0.4); padding-bottom: 1px;
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 24px 0; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #ffd4be; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: #ff6b4a; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 8px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #ffe8dd; color: #2b1a10; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 12.5px; color: #a07862; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; font-style: italic;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #ff6b4a; letter-spacing: 14px; font-size: 13px; margin: 36px 0; user-select: none; opacity: 0.7;

highlights.hl_yellow: background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 55%, #ffe8a8 55%); color: #2b1a10; padding: 0 5px; font-weight: 600;

list_style.label: A · 珊瑚圆章
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#ff6b4a,#ffa570); color: #ffffff; font-weight: 800; font-size: 11px; min-width: 24px; height: 22px; line-height: 22px; text-align: center; border-radius: 11px; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: 2px; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(255,107,74,0.3);
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; width: 7px; height: 7px; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#ff6b4a,#ffa570); border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: 3px;
